differential_diagnoses: Legionella pneumophila pneumonia with rhabdomyolysis and acute kidney injury
Dermatomyositis/Antisynthetase syndrome presenting with ILD and rhabdomyolysis
next_steps: Urgent hemodialysis for severe AKI and metabolic derangements
Direct fluorescent antibody (DFA) or PCR for Legionella from respiratory secretions
Creatine kinase monitoring and aggressive fluid resuscitation
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for atypical pathogens if empirical treatment fails
Autoimmune myositis workup (myositis-specific antibody panel, ferritin, inflammatory markers)
